005cf87969c18e2d.title: Improved performance of opening recently-inactive background agent sessions in `claude agents`

22c4ebfe3efb5e4c.title: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ALTERNATE_SCREEN=1` env var to opt out of the fullscreen alternate-screen renderer and keep the conversation in the terminal's native scrollback

88489c146ee292bc.title: Removed the stale "& for background" hint from the shortcuts help panel

b818ca47e72721da.title: Added projected context cost (per-turn and per-invocation token estimates) to the `/plugin` marketplace browse pane

ba216478924071c7.title: Updated `/model` picker: collapsed duplicate Opus 4.7 entries, and current Opus now shows as "Opus" instead of "Opus 4.7"

bb299f2cd5292f74.title: VSCode] Press Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+T to reopen the most recently closed session tab, configurable via `claudeCode.enableReopenClosedSessionShortcut`

bdaddd6085129ed0.title: Added `--plugin-url <url>` flag to fetch a plugin `.zip` archive from a URL for the current session

bdbac080b4a1f75e.title: Reduced terminal rendering glitches in VS Code by reducing spinner animation color count

be647c4997589340.title: Stop and SubagentStop hook input now includes `background_tasks` and `session_crons` fields

bf1921c744e3f067.title: VSCode] Auto mode no longer requires the bypass-permissions setting to appear in the mode picker, and a dismissable notice on the new-session screen explains auto mode the first...

bf311350b007137b.title: Improved rendering performance for large file writes

c160cad1777bf52c.title: claude agents`: PR column now shows `PR #N` for a single PR or `N PRs` for multiple

c23f1971704adf1d.title: Status line commands now receive `COLUMNS` and `LINES` environment variables so scripts can size output to the terminal width

c2ce3267d7bbe3f5.title: Markdown output now renders GFM task list checkboxes (`- [ ] todo` / `- [x] done`) instead of plain bullets

c2f6fbae4c6fc61e.title: Windows: PowerShell 7 installed via the Microsoft Store, MSI without PATH, or `.NET global tool` is now detected

c4c14d11b097b022.title: Auto mode is now available on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry for Opus 4.7 and Opus 4.8

c4f072822cfd8b08.title: Fullscreen mode: clipboard now uses `wl-copy`/`xclip`/`xsel` on Linux when available, copies to both the clipboard and PRIMARY selection for middle-click paste, and the "hold...

c5180a4c8317c9e4.title: Renamed the dynamic-workflow trigger keyword from `workflow` to `ultracode`

c665f306a50dd967.title: Improved the auto-mode classifier's detection of data exfiltration, particularly bulk transfers of repository contents

c6fba5e31a01b8a2.title: Windows: when the PowerShell tool is enabled, Claude now treats PowerShell as the primary shell instead of defaulting to Bash

c7d1f2c252ca62c5.title: Added `/goal` command: set a completion condition and Claude keeps working across turns until it's met

c83395af6d75f19f.title: claude agents`: type `! <command>` to run a shell command as a background session you can attach to and detach from

c9842b53eded81bc.title: Claude Code now switches to your configured `--fallback-model` for the rest of the session when the primary model is not found, instead of failing every request

c9ca35bb712f1e37.title: claude agents` rows now show `done/total` before the detail when work is fanned out; peek shows the longest-running item

ca7c2f535db3195d.title: Skills and slash commands can now set `disallowed-tools` in frontmatter to remove tools from the model while the skill is active

ce0238bddbc0e1fe.title: Improved the Read tool to return a truncated first page with a "PARTIAL view" notice instead of a hard error when a whole-file read exceeds the token limit

ce2026bcc2816853.title: /context all` per-skill token estimates now account for the model's tokenizer and show rounded values

ce537f3dd1a5d1f0.title: The `/model` picker now lists models from your gateway's `/v1/models` endpoint when `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` points at an Anthropic-compatible gateway

cf9a7317e85bb660.title: The `/plugin` browse and discover panes now show when a plugin was last updated

d0e0c540f607ee19.title: Added a "Pasting…" footer hint while a Ctrl+V image paste is being read from the clipboard

d1bf3e63c1161f15.title: Added `claude plugin details <name>` to show a plugin's component inventory and projected per-session token cost

d33d982cf17b728c.title: Policy refusal error messages now include the API Request ID for easier support debugging

d631579b402aeb9c.title: Resumed sessions now keep the model they were using instead of picking up another session's `/model` choice

d97e627f85afa349.title: Improved spinner feedback during long thinking periods — the spinner now warms to amber after 10 seconds to signal Claude is still working

d9db26eb6376d5c7.title: Fixed: on Windows, pressing ← in `claude agents` while a response was streaming could leave the agents list unresponsive to all input

d9e6d5496212e212.title: strict-mcp-config` no longer strips inline `mcpServers` from explicitly-passed agent definitions (`--agents` / SDK `agents`), and blocked subagent MCP servers now surface a...

d9fc11c2286223f2.title: VSCode] Fixed in-chat mic showing no feedback when the microphone produced only silence — now shows "No audio detected"

dbb7b6cddd4e3601.title: claude agents`: slash-command autocomplete in the dispatch input now matches substrings

dc8e76a6e4aef29b.title: /mcp` Reconnect now picks up `.mcp.json` edits without a restart, and shows the HTTP status and URL when reconnecting fails

dd85c3bc92694539.title: MCP stdio servers now receive `CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` in their environment, matching hooks

dd9fec86ccea8328.title: claude agents`: `/logout` now signs you out instead of being sent to a background session

df8d421aa10d182e.title: Removed the JetBrains plugin install suggestion from startup

dffe14536e4ffe2d.title: Read tool: removed the per-file malware-assessment reminder that could cause spurious refusals and "this is not malware" commentary on legacy models

e7b7f612ffdb0fe4.title: claude agents`: launching a session no longer fails when the pre-warmed background worker is unhealthy — now falls back to a fresh launch

e800f12591c6f4b2.title: Added `worktree.bgIsolation: "none"` setting to let background sessions edit the working copy directly without `EnterWorktree`, for repos where worktrees are impractical

ea28e2ad0ea45c92.title: Prompt history no longer records consecutive duplicate entries — recalling a prompt with arrow-up and submitting it again won't add another copy

eaad3041b0ecf8bb.title: Added autocomplete for `/plugin` arguments: subcommands, installed plugin names, and plugins from known marketplaces

eb0e7b44bd870bae.title: VSCode] Fixed extension failing to activate on Windows

ec2e8e018c6ca663.title: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE`: when set on Homebrew or WinGet installations, Claude Code runs the upgrade command in the background and prompts to restart

f025286de89cd2ca.title: The Feature of the Week credit-claim status now appears as a notification in the status area instead of a line above the prompt

f1f4d13f1e162284.title: Improved error message when `--worktree` collides with an existing or stale worktree

f2373d268f49f18f.title: VSCode] Fixed `/clear` not clearing the conversation context and displayed transcript

f2db6a87b1eaab2a.title: claude auth login` now accepts the OAuth code pasted into the terminal when the browser callback can't reach localhost (WSL2, SSH, containers)

f53bfb888c4de948.title: Added `worktree.baseRef` setting (`fresh` | `head`) to choose whether `--worktree`, `EnterWorktree`, and agent-isolation worktrees branch from `origin/<default>` or local `HEAD`

f55396686e6370f8.title: Fast mode now uses Opus 4.7 by default (previously Opus 4.6)

f5bbd348aed5a05b.title: /simplify` now runs a cleanup-only review (reuse, simplification, efficiency, altitude) and applies the fixes, instead of running the full `/code-review --fix` bug-hunting review

f618b537a3942ad1.title: claude agents` / `--bg` rejection messages now name the specific gate (non-TTY, env var, or setting) instead of a generic message

f63b86fa322e5218.title: /bg` and `←`-detach now preserve directories added via `/add-dir`

f69f656bda636479.title: Improved auto mode classifier latency by reducing reasoning on routine actions, lowering the chance of "could not evaluate this action" blocks

f80ea3596a1829b2.title: Introducing dynamic workflows: ask Claude to create a workflow and it orchestrates work across tens to hundreds of agents in the background, so you can take on larger, more...

f8a5b71ee426e1fe.title: Removed the "/ide for …" startup hint toast

f98869534baed3c9.title: macOS: background agents now appear as "Claude Code" in Privacy & Security and keep their permission grants across upgrades

fa27555aace79e1b.title: /model` now changes the model for the current session only; press `d` in the model picker to set a default for new sessions

fd9c8329b968ce9f.title: Windows: clipboard writes no longer expose copied content in process command-line arguments visible to EDR/SIEM telemetry; also fixes >22KB selections not reaching the clipboard

fe5e85c1569c835e.title: Use saved searches to filter your results more quickly

feb56e25a7186765.title: claude agents` now accepts `--add-dir`, `--settings`, `--mcp-config`, and `--plugin-dir` and applies them to the dashboard and to background sessions dispatched from it

ff7fe2542576e738.title: Edit no longer requires a separate Read after viewing a file with `grep`: single-file `grep`/`egrep`/`fgrep` commands now satisfy the read-before-edit check
